name: combobox
title: Combobox
description: Searchable single-select. Converted from shadcn ui/combobox.tsx (base-ui Combobox + InputGroup, cmdk-shaped generic API) — single-select only, multi-select Chips variant dropped (no known consumer). Server-rendered option list filtered by substring match, hidden input for native form participation, dispatches change for Form.astro's revalidation.
